title: Laboratory Technology Mission and Vision
content:
Laboratory Technology Mission and Vision

Vision: To be a program whose graduates are preferred by the business life, that leads the developments, follows the innovations, has a sustainable education system, is proud to be a part of it and takes the first place in student preferences.

Mission: To educate qualified individuals who have sufficient technical education, knowledge and skills, equipped, productive, researcher, self-confident, sensitive to ethical values, contribute to the development of the relevant sector, follow technological developments and adapt to changing conditions.
